notes: Set cwd to a producer-local worktree for Mac mini or Notebook; never point producer nodes at the Desktop canonical source root.
Supabase entries are environment variable names only; set project_ref in the Supabase MCP URL after target selection and keep token values outside this file.
Do not put raw API keys, tokens, cookies, private env dumps, or large base64 values in this client config.
Desktop remains the only final source applier and verifier.
